plugins.name: Sample Plugin
plugins.description: A minimal example plugin that adds a button control to the map. Use it as a template for marketplace entries.
plugins.author: GeoLibre

plugins.name: Elevation Profile
plugins.description: Draw a line on the map to chart an elevation profile with distance, ascent/descent, and min/max stats. Samples elevation from the Open-Meteo API.
plugins.author: Qiusheng Wu
